name: Return By Death
description:
A Re:Zero-inspired mod. When you die, you rewind to your last save point (recorded every 20 seconds, configurable) with the inventory, hunger, vitals, XP, and potion effects you had at that moment. Plays the iconic Return By Death sound on death. Requires Instant Respawn.

v1.2.2: Version parity with Bedrock v1.2.2 hotfix. Java commands were already working.

v1.2.1 PATCH: Witch scent particles after death, Subaru-style death quotes, heartbeat sound at low HP, 'Witch is watching' message every 5th death.

v1.2.0: Default save interval 20s. New commands: /rbd revert, /rbd lastdeath, /rbd testsound. Death subtitle. Action bar save indicator. Better cause reporting.

v1.1.0: Configurable save interval, death counter ('loops'), death log, particle beacon, named save points, configurable sound volume/pitch/broadcast radius, action bar cooldown, save-point reset.

Inspired by Subaru Natsuki's ability from Re:Zero.
